Synthia cPanel deployment notes

Upload these two files to the verified document root for synthia.securedme.ca:
- index.html
- synthia-landing.css

Expected final layout:
synthia.securedme.ca/
  index.html
  synthia-landing.css

Before direct server deployment, verify the server path exists:
/home/xacm7978/synthia.securedme.ca

If the path does not exist, stop and do not guess another path.
